forSale.description: Discover an exceptionally rare opportunity to immerse yourself in the vibrant urban lifestyle of Austin, all while enjoying the charm and privacy of a unique compound! Nestled on an expansive .60-acre lot at 1411 W 10th Street, this updated Clarksville Estate was originally built in 1925. This prime location is just 1 mile from downtown Austin and half a mile from popular spots such as Medici and Swedish Hill. Jeffrey's, Josephine House, and the flagship Whole Foods are a leisurely 5-minute walk away. Spanning 6,647 square feet, this estate features a spacious 5-bedroom, 3.5-bath primary residence along with a separate 935 SF 2-bedroom, 1-bath guest home. The guest home includes a full kitchen, living area, and a wraparound porch overlooking the inviting pool area, which features an outdoor kitchen, shower, and fireplace. Additionally, there’s a stylish 925-square-foot garage apartment with downtown views, complete with a full kitchen and bath. The primary bedroom has been extensively renovated, offering stunning downtown views and a spa-like bathroom for your relaxation. The fully fenced front and side yards provide inviting spaces for intimate gatherings or larger group entertaining. This exceptional property offers the perfect blend of comfort, charm, and urban convenience!

The Colorfield is a collection of 10 residences featuring oversized floor plans with meticulously crafted, modern, highend finishes that provide a residential experience like no other. Unit 204 is located on the north corner of the building and features three spacious bedrooms, three full bathrooms and one half bathroom. The open floorplan begins with an entry foyer and den or flex space. Take in the unmatched skyline views of downtown Austin from the formal living and dining rooms and private covered terrace. As an added upgrade included in the offering, shades have been installed along the north and east sides of the residence, enhancing both comfort and privacy while complementing the home’s sophisticated design. The chef’s kitchen features high-end and sleek selections like polished nickel fixtures, stainless-steal appliances by Bosch and Gaggenau and a full-size wine refrigerator. The design scheme throughout is light and bright with natural wood cabinetry, Calacatta Gold countertops, and intricate mosaic accent tile. Located at the edge of Clarksville, The Colorfield is a walkable community that connects residents to the pulse of downtown living. Enjoy easy access to premium shopping, dining, and entertainment, all from a residential jewel beckoning to those who savor private and elevated living. Tax and assessed values are estimates for illustration purposes only. All figures should be independently verified. Some images are virtually staged.

To be completed Summer 2025! Located in Clarksville’s highly sought-after Westline community, 1406 W 9th Street #301 offers a rare standalone home in Austin’s newest blend of traditional charm and contemporary sophistication. With three bedrooms, two full bathrooms, a powder room, and two living spaces spread across two levels, this residence is designed for effortless living. The thoughtful layout ensures privacy for visiting family and guests, while the two-car garage and lock-and-leave lifestyle provide unmatched convenience. Perfectly positioned on the corner of the Westline community, the home strikes a harmonious balance between individuality and community. Crafted by the renowned Cumby Group, this home is part of an exclusive collection of 16 residences that seamlessly blend historical elements with modern design. Westline reimagines the architectural narrative of Clarksville while offering modern connectivity to downtown Austin. With its proximity to Lady Bird Lake, downtown Austin and world-class restaurants, this Westline home offers an exceptional opportunity to experience the best of both worlds in one of Austin’s most treasured neighborhoods. Tax and assessed values are estimates for illustration purposes only. All figures should be independently verified.

The Colorfield is a collection of 10 residences featuring oversized floor plans with high quality finishes that will deliver residents an unrivaled Austin lifestyle while living steps from Downtown. Every detail of these spectacular living spaces is meticulously crafted with modern, high-end finishes to provide a residential experience like no other. Unit 201 features three spacious bedrooms, three full bathrooms and one half bathroom. The open floorplan begins with an entry foyer and den or flex space. Take in the unmatched skyline views of downtown Austin from the formal living and dining rooms. The chef’s kitchen features high-end and sleek selections like polished nickel fixtures, stainless-steel appliances by Bosch and Gaggenau and a full-size wine refrigerator. Located at the edge of Clarksville, The Colorfield is a walkable community that connects residents to the pulse of downtown living. Enjoy easy access to premium shopping, dining, and entertainment, all from a residential jewel beckoning to those who savor private and elevated living. Tax and assessed values are estimates based on the list price for illustration purposes only. All figures should be independently verified.

The Colorfield is a collection of 10 residences featuring oversized floor plans with meticulously crafted, modern, high-end finishes that provide a residential experience like no other. Unit 203 features three spacious bedrooms, three full bathrooms and one half bathroom. The open floorplan begins with an entry foyer and den or flex space. Take in the unmatched skyline views of downtown Austin from the formal living, dining room, private covered terrace and primary suite. The chef’s kitchen features high-end and sleek selections like polished nickel fixtures, stainless-steel appliances by Bosch and Gaggenau and a full-size wine refrigerator. The design scheme throughout is light and bright with natural wood cabinetry and intricate mosaic accent tile. Located at the edge of Clarksville, The Colorfield is a walkable community that connects residents to the pulse of downtown living. Clarksville, one of the most sought-after neighborhoods in central Austin, where you can walk to everything. Incredibly special property with 5 distinct “units” that can be rented, this property also presents an ideal single-family residence featuring both attached and detached guest quarters-perfect for extended living, hosting, or added flexibility. Enjoy access to an array of culinary delights, with dozens of restaurants, bars, and retail, all just steps from your front and back door. The flagship Whole Foods stands nearby, making grocery shopping a cinch. Additionally, owners can enjoy the natural beauty of Lady Bird Lake's hike and bike trail, the YMCA, & Pease Park. Beyond its prime location, the property offers incredible residential income opportunity with a main house plus three, or possibly four, apartments with varying bedroom and bathroom mixes (see agent for unit breakdown). Each offers a charming blend of historic charm and modern convenience. Architecturally distinguished, the house and its counterparts on Baylor Street & West 9th Street date back to the early 1900s, having been carefully restored to preserve their original charm. The previous owner seamlessly combined a craftsman-style main house with Unit B, creating a living space that accommodates two to four bedrooms, an office, downstairs studio/living room, walk-in closet, laundry room, and two full bathrooms. The property is complete with two additional detached units and one private unit that could be rented or used as a guest apartment, plus an off-street parking area for three vehicles and a spacious two-car garage with storage and washer-dryer hookups. The custom decorative iron fence, crafted by welder/metalsmith Andy Reed a decade ago, adds a touch of elegance to the property. The current owner bought it for family to attend UT and cleaned it up immensely in their short time owning the property. It's clean, beautiful, and ready to be enjoyed! Call or text today for an easy showing!

Expected completion Summer/Fall 2026! Westline is a curated collection of 16 modern and historic-inspired residences in the heart of Clarksville, offering four distinct luxury design schemes. Homes range from 2, 4 bedrooms, each with a private two-car garage. The architecture blends classic peaked rooflines and chimney accents with modern windows and doors, complemented by rich stone detailing at the lower levels. Manicured lawns and white picket fences evoke the charm of the West Line Historic District, honoring its legacy of expansive estates while introducing a refined, contemporary lifestyle. Ideally located, Westline offers seamless access to Downtown Austin while preserving the neighborhood’s historic suburban character. Residence #802 (Floorplan G) features two en suite guest bedrooms and a spacious laundry room on the main level. The second level showcases an open-concept living space anchored by a gourmet kitchen with a center island, breakfast bar, and premium GE appliance package. Light, bright interior selections include White Patina European oak hardwood floors, Calacatta Gold marble countertops, and a white herringbone backsplash. The primary suite is complete with an expansive walk-in closet and dual vanity. Clarksville is a highly walkable neighborhood known for its historic bungalows, parks, and vibrant mix of cafés and shops. Located approximately one mile from Downtown Austin, Westline offers convenient access to West Austin Neighborhood Park, the Hike & Bike Trail, Lady Bird Lake, Whole Foods Market, Trader Joe’s, and major highways. Photos are representative of a similar floorplan and finish-out and do not depict the actual unit. Variations in layout, finishes, views, and features may exist. Buyers should verify all details, features, & conditions in person. Tax and assessed values are estimates based on the list price for illustration purposes only; all figures should be independently verified. MORE at EricMorelandGroup.com/Westline

Designed by KTGY Architects with interiors by Kim Lewis Design, The Belvedere brings boutique mid-rise living to Old West Austin. Perfectly positioned between Downtown, Clarksville, and Lady Bird Lake, the building sits at one of Austin’s most connected addresses.

The Belvedere offers a rare connection to Austin’s most beloved outdoor space: the Butler Hike and Bike Trail along Lady Bird Lake. In partnership with the Austin Parks Foundation, a new on-site trailhead will connect residents directly to the trail, making morning runs, evening walks, and lakeside moments part of everyday life.

This connection is further enhanced by a new park on The Belvedere lawn. Expanded green space will include upgraded sidewalks, dedicated bikeways, and improved public access to the trail, creating a seamless link between the residence and the lakefront.

Residents arrive through a 24 hour attended lobby with concierge service. Amenities are designed for both wellness and ease, including shaded outdoor seating, water features, and direct trail access designed by Nudge Design. The Wellness Level features Austin’s largest downtown lap pool, saunas, cold plunges, treatment rooms, and a state of the art fitness center. Additional spaces include an owner’s lounge, pet lounge, co working suites, golf simulator, and a guest suite.

Residence 212 is a 2-bed 2-bath + study floor plan, with a south-facing private balcony that overlooks the 75 foot lap pool, the park, and Lady Bird Lake. Interior finishes include stone and wood flooring, natural stone countertops, Thermador appliances, and spa style baths. Type I concrete construction with acoustic glass provides lasting quality and quiet comfort.

Estimated delivery Q3 2027. Schedule a tour of the sales gallery, located at 504 Oakland Ave.
forSale.listOffice: Christies Intl Real Estate Lone Star

forSale.description:
Tucked into the heart of the Clarksville area, this stand-alone, fully private condo at 1609A W 8th Street offers an exceptional blend of modern comfort, thoughtful updates, and unbeatable urban convenience. From the moment you arrive, you’re greeted by a charming covered porch, mature trees, and a serene setting that feels like a hidden retreat, yet is just minutes from downtown and Austin’s most iconic destinations.
Inside, a bright and airy floorplan welcomes you with a seamless flow designed for both everyday living and effortless entertaining. The fully remodeled kitchen showcases sleek quartz countertops, custom cabinetry with abundant storage, stainless steel appliances, and an oversized island that opens beautifully to the main living and dining space. Stylish finishes and two distinct living areas create a warm, inviting atmosphere.
Upstairs, the spacious primary suite offers a true respite, complete with a spa-inspired bathroom featuring a large walk-in shower, dual vanity, and a luxurious soaking tub. Generously sized secondary bedrooms provide flexibility for guests, a home office, or additional living needs.
One of the home’s most compelling features is the expansive covered outdoor living area, perfect for relaxing, hosting, or enjoying Austin evenings year-round. A dedicated media room adds even more versatility, complete with a built-in Murphy bed and full bathroom, making it an ideal guest suite for visitors or extended stays.
All of this is just moments from Old West Austin favorites, top-tier dining, boutique shopping, the Butler Trail, and everything that makes Austin’s urban core so highly sought after.

forSale.description: Short Term Rental friendly and furnishings can convey!!! Live the vibrant downtown lifestyle in this stylish one-bedroom condo located in the highly desirable De Saligny community, just one block from Lamar and 12th Street in the heart of historic Clarksville. Surrounded by Austin favorites like Pease Park, Castle Hill Fitness, House Park, Shoal Creek Saloon, The Tavern, and Fresa’s, this home places you steps away from everything you love about city living. Inside, the spacious open floorplan features a welcoming living room with a cozy fireplace, a dining area, and a recently updated kitchen with sleek, modern finishes. A built-in desk at the entry provides the perfect work-from-home setup, while the generous one-bedroom layout includes a full bath adorned with elegant fixtures and a touch of luxury. Enjoy views of your private courtyard from the main living space, an ideal spot to unwind or entertain. Community amenities include a tranquil pool, sun deck, and a serene open green space right at the center of the residences, offering a rare blend of privacy and community. With easy, convenient parking right outside your front door and all of downtown Austin at your fingertips, this home is urban living at its best.

forSale.description:
Introducing Your Dream Condo!
Step into this stunningly renovated 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom condo nestled in the desirable Escorial Condominiums in coveted Clarksville area! With an abundance of natural light, this home is designed for modern living. It has a very inviting open floor-plan! The spacious living-dining-kitchen area is perfect for both relaxation and entertainment, featuring a cozy gas fireplace and a stylish new chandelier. Cook up a storm in the gourmet kitchen equipped with a copper double sink, ensuring both functionality and elegance. The private outdoor oasis is a showstopper! Enjoy your morning coffee or evening gatherings on your charming private side patio, or take a stroll to the beautifully landscaped gated courtyard and refreshing swimming pool. This condo also includes a coveted single-car garage plus an additional assigned partially covered parking space for your convenience. Don’t miss out on this incredible opportunity! Schedule your visit today and experience the perfect blend of comfort and style!

forSale.description:
Experience the perfect blend of comfort, style, and location in this beautifully updated 2-bedroom, 2.5-bath condo, where each bedroom features its own private ensuite bath for ultimate convenience and privacy. Thoughtfully remodeled, the kitchen and bathrooms shine with granite countertops, updated cabinetry, new sinks, and modern fixtures, and stainless steel appliances. The kitchen flows seamlessly into the inviting living area, enhanced by warm bamboo flooring, while new carpeting upstairs adds a fresh, cozy feel.

Thoughtful updates/upgrades include new Andersen windows installed in 2025, and sliding balcony doors, bringing in abundant natural light while improving energy efficiency. The home offers a peaceful, treehouse-like atmosphere, providing a quiet retreat right in the heart of downtown. Unbeatable proximity to everyday conveniences, including grocery stores, restaurants, shops, and easy access to MoPac for commuting

The well-managed HOA adds exceptional value, covering internet, cable, and gas for the fireplace and range, while proactively maintaining the community with scheduled capital improvements. Residents can also take advantage of the relaxing pool area and an updated clubhouse, ideal for gatherings. Additional features include centrally heated water and a community-wide water softener system, enhancing comfort and ease of living in this exceptional condo.

forSale.description: This charming 2 bedroom, 2 bathroom top-floor end-unit condo offers an exceptional opportunity to live in the heart of Austin’s highly sought-after Clarksville neighborhood. With 1,251 sq. ft. of thoughtfully designed living space, this light-filled corner unit blends peaceful, tree-lined surroundings with unbeatable walkability to some of Austin’s most beloved destinations, including Whole Foods Market, Desnudo Coffee, BookPeople, Waterloo Records, and Josephine House. The versatile floor plan features two separate living areas and a split-bedroom layout, perfect for relaxing, dining, entertaining, or creating a dedicated home office. Enjoy back porch sunsets from the balcony. Recent updates include a remodeled kitchen and primary bathroom, fresh interior paint, hardwood flooring, and spacious walk-in closets in both bedrooms. Enjoy added convenience with plentiful resident and guest parking, an in-unit full-sized washer and dryer, and abundant natural light enhanced by skylights. Located in historic Old West Austin, this home offers easy access to Lady Bird Lake, scenic hike and bike trails, Pease Park, West Austin Neighborhood Park, and the vibrant energy of downtown, making it an ideal choice for homeowners or investors seeking a rare opportunity in one of Austin’s most desirable neighborhoods. The unit also includes two dedicated parking space that legally conveys with the condo, along with ample additional parking available for both residents and guests. All the furniture is for sale.

forSale.description:
Incredible opportunity to own a darling turn-key condo in one of Austin's most beloved neighborhoods! Upon arrival, step down from your RSVP parking spot to your very own private front patio. Inside the front door, a cheerful hall and gleaming Saltillo tile floors beckon you into the grand light-filled living space. The living room flows seamlessly into the designated dining area, which displays an impressive floor-to-ceiling showpiece of a fireplace. Outside the glass patio doors you'll find a spacious covered porch surrounded by mature trees that overlooks the community pool. The fully updated chef's kitchen features corian countertops, recent appliances, abundant cabinet space + a rare in-unit washer/dryer! Enter the expansive, tranquil owner's suite to find a skylight w/ retractable cover + a huge walk-in-closet with custom Elfa shelving. The updated bathroom features a dual shower/tub, storage galore, + a bluetooth sound system! The West End Condo community itself is nestled into the heart of historic and prestigious Clarksville, walking distance to all of the hip neighborhood hot spots. This is the first time in 26 years Unit #13 has come to market- don't miss out on this truly one-of-a-kind treasure! Welcome home.
*SOME FURNITURE FOR SALE- SEE AGENT*

forSale.description:
Minutes from Downtown, Lady Bird Lake and Austin’s iconic hike and bike trails, perfect for morning runs or leisurely sunset strolls. Enjoy world-class dining at award-winning neighborhood favorites like Jeffrey’s and Cipollina, both just around the corner. Explore the cultural and educational heartbeat of the city at the nearby University of Texas or stroll to the majestic Texas State Capitol, all within easy reach.

Perched on the third floor with peekaboo views of the downtown skyline and UT Tower, this home perfectly balances serene comfort with vibrant city access. a sophisticated two-bedroom, two-bath condominium offering effortless city living in one of Central Austin’s most sought-after neighborhoods. Two reserved parking spaces, a rare luxury in this prime location, make coming and going seamless. Step outside your door and enjoy the pool and grilling area for owners. 

Inside, you’ll find a thoughtful layout ideal for entertaining or quiet relaxation, with spacious bedrooms, updated baths, and an open-living concept.

Whether you're looking for a vibrant home base in the city or a lock-and-leave lifestyle, this property delivers on every level with location and convenience.

forSale.description: Currently used as a Mid-term rental (MTR). Private assigned Parking Spot T. Short-term Rental (STR) allowed. Incredible condo off West 6th Street, walk to bars, restaurants, and shopping! Enjoy the best of the Clarksville neighborhood. The updated kitchen boasts granite countertops and stainless appliances, complemented by beautiful hardwood floors throughout. Plus, enjoy access to a community pool. Condo features stackable washer/dryer connections with appliances that convey, a spacious walk-in closet, built-in shelving, and an open floor plan. Enjoy the convenient access to the hike and bike trail. All furnishings can convey if buyer wants to own as furnished rental (MTR,STR) or occupy themselves.

forSale.description:
Located in the heart of historic Clarksville, one of Austin’s most charming and walkable neighborhoods, this move-in ready 1-bedroom, 1-bath condo offers a rare opportunity to own in the coveted 78703 zip code for under $295K. Positioned on the second floor of a boutique 12-unit mid-century garden-style complex, the home welcomes you with a serene, landscaped courtyard and light-filled, thoughtfully designed interiors.

Inside, vaulted ceilings, real tongue-and-groove hardwood floors, and expansive windows create an airy, inviting atmosphere. The open-concept kitchen and living area is ideal for both everyday living and entertaining, featuring Silestone countertops, a glass tile backsplash, stainless steel appliances, and a full appliance package that conveys. The spacious bedroom offers a quiet retreat with a walk-in closet, while the efficient layout maximizes comfort and livability.

Additional highlights include a dedicated parking space and a true lock-and-leave lifestyle, perfect for professionals, students, or investors. Just steps from Clarksville Park, Jeffrey’s, Josephine House, Fresh Plus Grocery, and some of Austin’s most beloved restaurants, coffee shops, and boutiques, and minutes to downtown, UT, and Lady Bird Lake, this location delivers the best of central Austin living.

Whether you’re a first-time buyer, investor, or searching for a pied-à-terre this is a rare chance to own in Clarksville at a price point that’s increasingly hard to find.

*Minimum lease term 6 months. HOA prohibits transient or hotel-type use, so Airbnb/short-term rentals are not allowed*

forSale.description: The heart of Downtown / Old West Austin at an incredible price! A location that can't be beat, and the perfect area for ditching the car and grabbing a bike - or walk it! Stones throw to loads of dining, hot spots and even a little grocery store. West Lynn, West 5th / 6th, Castle Hill - all the spots you love at such an affordable price. Best part, live in a multi million dollar neighborhood with charming story book Victorian era homes and modern sleek architecture, all mixed together with this funky vintage 1970's courtyard style condo! Relax on the patio balcony and view downtown, it's all possible at Old Castle Hill on West 10th!
